publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-03-22 23:51:22 -0400.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Dr. Griswold's "Autobiographical Notes, prepared for his descendants" (247 pp., 1938-40); two printed copies of Griswold's studies of Hinduism; five typed or printed items pertaining to his career as a missionary at Forman Christian College, Lahore, India (now Pakistan); pamphlet "Sketches of My Indian Childhood" by Frances Griswold Wooddell (116 pp., n.d.); genealogical pamphlet on the Griswold family of Dryden, New York; and typescript poems by Hervey De Witt Griswold (28 pp.).

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Missionary, professor of philosophy, Presbyterian minister.
Hervey DeWitt Griswold received his Ph.D. from Cornell in 1900.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Dr. Griswold's "Autobiographical Notes, prepared for his descendants" (247 pp., 1938-40); two printed copies of Griswold's studies of Hinduism; five typed or printed items pertaining to his career as a missionary at Forman Christian College, Lahore, India (now Pakistan); pamphlet "Sketches of My Indian Childhood" by Frances Griswold Wooddell (116 pp., n.d.); genealogical pamphlet on the Griswold family of Dryden, New York; and typescript poems by Hervey De Witt Griswold (28 pp.).

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Hervey DeWitt Griswold papers, #2124. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Manuscript: "Autobiographical Notes, prepared for his descendants," written by Dr. Griswold between Aug. 1938 and Apr. 1940 [see pp. 1, 246]. 247 pp., written on lined loose-leaf notebook paper. Chapter contents as follows:

list.item: I. "Early Days and First School," pp. 1-7.
II. "The Dryden School and Youthful Poetry," pp. 7-36.
III. "Miscellaneous Experiences at High School," pp. 36-48.
XI. "In India, 1891," pp. 179-247. [Actually includes entire career in India; work for Ph.D. at Cornell, 1899-1900; family; travels in Europe and Near East; people met, etc.]

did.unittitle: Bound into one volume: "The Dayanandi Interpretation of the Word 'Deva' in the Rig Veda," Lodiana: Mission Press, 1897 , 23 pp. and Cornell Studies in Philosophy No. 2 - "Brahman: A Study in the History of Indian Philosophy," New York: Macmillan, 1900 , 89 pp. Both by Dr. Griswold. [Cover in poor condition.]
Typescript excerpts from an article in "The Continent," Jan. 15, 1925 , by Cleland B. McAfee, "Griswold of India." 3 pp.
Typescript copy of editorial in praise of Dr. Griswold appearing in the Forman Christian College magazine, Jan. 1928 .
Advertisement for a scholarly publication, The Moslem World, showing table of contents page for the Jan. 1913 issue, published in London in the interests of Christian missions in Moslem lands.
"The Ancestors and Descendants of Edward Griswold of Dryden, New York," compiled by Hervey DeWitt Griswold and Minnie Griswold Space, 1930 . 82 pp.
Seventy-fifth Anniversary Series, "India Awakening," by Rev. H.D. Griswold, D.D., published by The Board of Foreign Missions of the Presbyterian Church in the U.S.A., N.Y.C., Apr. 1912 . 12 pp.
"The Folio," the Forman Christian College magazine, May-June 1942 . Published by E.T. Dean, Forman Christian College, Lahore. 40 pp. in English, remainder in Urdu, Hindi, and Panjabi.

"Founders' Day, 1959. Address delivered by Dr. F.M. Velte in the College Hall on Mar. 3, 1959," printed in the Forman Christian College Founders' day pamphlet published by the Northern Pakistan Printing & Publishing Company, Lahore, 1959 . 12 pp.
Typescript copy of poems by Hervey DeWitt Griswold, 28 pp.
"Sketches of My Indian Childhood," n.d. 116 pp. pamphlet.

The God Varuna in the Rig-Veda, Bulletin No. 1 of the Society of Comparative Theology and Philosophy. A Paper Read before the Society ..., Cornell University, Jan. 22, 1910. (Taylor & Carpenter: Ithaca, N.Y., Apr. 12, 1910 ). 36 pp.
The Love of God, A Sermon Preached in Kellogg Memorial Church, Landour, on Aug. 4th, 1907, and published by request. (The 'Albert' Press: Labhore, 1907 ). 6 pp.
Methods of Teaching Village Christians to Read, (Christian Literature Society for India: Madras, 1915 ). 56 pp.
